title: pedicularis gracilis var. stricta
intro: Pedicularis gracilis var. stricta, also known as the strict lousewort, is a plant species that belongs to the Pedicularis genus, a group of flowering plants commonly found in mountainous regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Pedicularis gracilis var. stricta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
